title: Fix CI: rust 1.87 too old for transitive deps
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

First CI run on main (run 25601663135) failed because transitive deps now require rustc 1.88+:
- darling/darling_core/darling_macro 0.23.0 require 1.88
- instability 0.3.12 requires 1.88
- time/time-core require 1.88

Fix: bump workspace rust-version to 1.88 in Cargo.toml AND switch the CI workflow from a pinned 1.87 to 'stable' (so future dep bumps don't silently break CI again). Local dev shell already uses 1.94, this only catches up to reality.

AC:
- cargo build --workspace passes locally and on CI.
- .github/workflows/ci.yml uses dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable without an explicit version override.
- Cargo.toml workspace.package.rust-version is bumped (target floor that compiles).
